stemHtml: What is the validity period for a Class 2 Medical Certificate?

options.a: 60 months until age 40, 24 months until age 50, and 12 months thereafter.
options.b: 60 months until age 30, 24 months until age 40, and 12 months thereafter.
options.c: 24 months until age 40, 12 months until age 60, and 6 months thereafter.
options.d: 24 months until age 40 and 12 months thereafter.
